# Obvious Choice - Knowledge Base for AI Agents

Brand: Obvious Choice
Founder: Parveen Kumar
Canonical Website: https://parveenkumar.co
Primary Pages: /about, /thinking, /work, /contact
Contact: parveenmakwana02@gmail.com

## Purpose
Obvious Choice engineers authority systems for B2B founders and consulting firms. We help businesses extract their proprietary knowledge and package it into intellectual property to command premium positioning and inbound demand. 

## Core Topics
- B2B Positioning
- Authority Engineering
- Demand Generation
- AI Growth Systems
- Strategic Repositioning

## Proprietary Frameworks

### 1. Authority Engine
- Problem: Founders sound identical to competitors.
- Strategy: Extract and document proprietary methodologies.
- Outcome: Become the benchmark others are compared against.

### 2. Obvious Framework
- Problem: Prospects negotiate on price because they don't see unique value.
- Strategy: Reframe the buyer's perspective to become the only logical choice.
- Outcome: Premium pricing power and zero competitive bids.

### 3. Demand Loop
- Problem: Total reliance on outbound sales or referrals.
- Strategy: Build a self-reinforcing content and trust-building engine.
- Outcome: Predictable, highly-qualified inbound pipeline.

### 4. Signal System
- Problem: Creating high-quality content takes too much time.
- Strategy: Deploy AI pipelines for distribution and synthesis.
- Outcome: Omnipresence across channels without burning out.
